classifiedFeedback.rawContent: Complete GET /incident-owner/:incident_id through the existing API and service modules. A known incident must return status 200 with a body containing exactly id and owner. A missing incident must return status 404 with the stable body {"error": "incident not found"}. Keep the repository module and existing verification-only suites unchanged. This reliability case must exercise plan correction: the initial plan should intentionally name only incident/service.py and omit the API handler and new regression; after preflight rejects that incomplete plan, return a corrected complete plan covering incident/api.py, incident/service.py, public-handler verification, backing unit coverage, and an independently runnable unittest under the documented generated-test location.
classifiedFeedback.summary: Complete and verify GET /incident-owner/:incident_id with exact success and missing-incident responses while preserving the repository and existing verification suites.
